positive: A minimalist, high-contrast geometric portrait of a stylized woodland creature (like a stylized fox or deer) interacting with abstract floral elements. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, featuring strong black and white silhouettes with accents of deep teal and gold leaf texture. The style should blend Art Deco elegance with modern linocut woodblock printing. Focus on clean lines, intricate negative space, and a sophisticated, nature-inspired motif suitable for apparel printing. Clean, crisp lines, solid color blocks, vectorial quality, centered.
